LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT PETER BOYER, TRUSTEE, AND MARGARET BOYER'S PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION. TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON OCTOBER 18, 2024, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES ARISING FROM LANDLORD-TENANT DISPUTES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. BOTH PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 7, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Oct-18-2024 Text Ruling

Notice Of Hearing On Daniel Philbin And Hannah Philbin Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-18-2024 Text Ruling

PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2024 Continued To Oct-18-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT PETER BOYER, TRUSTEE, AND MARGARET BOYER's PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION.

Transferred to be heard in Department 501 on October 18, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases arising from landlord-tenant disputes per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Both parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than October 7, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
